name: Sol Badguy
description: __Height:__ 184 cm (6'0") __Birthplace:__ United States __Weapon:__ Fireseal (Fire-based sword) __Race:__ Gear (Formerly human) Sol Badguy is the protagonist of the Guilty Gear series and Ky Kiske's rival. He is an aloof and brash bounty hunter of immense skill on a quest to find and eliminate all Gears and their creator, That Man. For a short time, Sol was also a member of the Sacred Order of Holy Knights and fought in the Crusades. This past version of him is known as "Order-Sol".

name: Colt
description: Colt (コルト, Koruto) is a Chimera Ant squadron leader. His name from when he was human is Kurt.

name: Exusiai
description: __Place of Birth:__ Laterano __Race:__ Sankta __Height:__ 159 cm Exusiai is a citizen of Laterano and as such, is entitled to the privileges listed in Clauses 1-13 of the Laterano Constitution. She is an employee of Penguin Logistics who specializes in covert communication, armed escort, and other undercover activities. We suspect she is a Messenger. While contracted with Penguin Logistics, she serves as a liaison to Rhodes Island, assisting us with our operations.

name: Jesus
description: God's only Son. A pretty laid back guy. He wears a crown of thorns upon his head of long locks, which some people find quite unnerving. He goes down to Earth with his enlightened buddy Buddha to take a vacation from the whole "God" thing.

description: A middle schooler who chooses to use the Death Note for a different, unique purpose. ~!Unlike Light Yagami, Minoru does not seem to have a strong sense of justice. Although he is morally opposed to using the Death Note himself, he has no issue with making it available to anyone who is willing to pay for it, regardless of how they plan to use it once he has sold it to them. name: Mona Tsukishiro
description: **Height**: 160 cm (5'3") Tsukishiro has a unique presence and manner of speaking. Her behavior and activity is quite strange, like bringing a love article into the office or licking Igarashi's fingers to heal her papercut. She often uses Russian phrases when greeting people. (Source: My Senpai Is Annoying Wiki)

name: Ryou Narushima
description: The protagonist of Shamo. As a child he was considered a genius, until one day he snapped and stabbed his parents to death. After being sent to juvenile prison, he learns karate to defend himself. Ryo Narushima is consistently depicted as being unrepentant for the murder of his parents and is shown repeatedly committing morally repugnant crimes such as assault and rape. name: Touya Mochizuki
description: Touya is a young boy who has come to this other world. For the most part, he is very well-mannered, but when he feels that those close to him could be harmed, he also has a side that will not hesitate. (Source: Honey's Anime)

name: Yasaburou Shimogamo
description: The third son of Souichirou Shimogamo, Yasaburou is a tanuki living in modern Kyoto who is obsessed with the daily life of humans, tanuki and tengu. After his father's death, he and his three brothers became known as the four tanuki losers of Kyoto and were labelled as disgraces to the tanuki name. Despite this, Yasaburou lives a carefree life shapeshifting into humans and observing the interaction of humans and tanuki while taking care of Akadama-sensei, an old tengu.

name: Bobobo-bo Bo-bobo
nativeName: ボボボーボ・ボーボボ
description: This is the cool and incomprehensible hero, swarthy and musclebound, sporting sunglasses and a large golden afro. His hair is 24-karat gold but is usually said to be yellow or blonde; some viewers even argue about its true color. He is called Bo-bobo for short. He refuses to let people call him Bo. He fights with his nose hair using the Hanage Shinken (sometimes "Super Fist of the Nose Hair", other times "Snot Fou-You"), as well as simply confusing his enemies. Giselle has an antagonistic relationship with Candice Catnipp; she claims Candice likes to have "fun" with her subordinates, and frequently mocks her power and temperament. name: Kuroko Koumori
description: An ex-serial killer, now national executioner. Koumori Kuroko loves cute girls, sex, and annihilating her targets. Even though she is now a hired assassin by the Japanese police force, she has a record of murdering 715 people in the past since her childhood. She has a girlfriend but actively flirts and sleeps with other women. She occasionally goes on dating sites to find said women.

description: Lordgenome is the ominous Spiral King, who rules the planet from his capitol city, Teppelin. name: Mars
description: __Height:__ 170 cm Mars is a mage of the Diamond Kingdom and one of its Eight Shining Generals. He is the Kingdom's product of human experimentation to enhance his Magic Power, with several magic stones embedded in his body.

name: Pakkun
description: Pakkun is one of Kakashi's summoning dogs, probably his favorite. He is a helpful tracker dog that can find and track most things; he's very calm, cool, and collected.

name: Ryou Amakusa
description: He is the older brother of [Rio](https://anilist.co/character/208077), [Ichika](https://anilist.co/character/141687)'s best friend, and the deputy manager of a prestigious company. He thinks that Ichika is the one and only, and has a fanatical one-sided love for her, which leads him to make strong approaches to her. (Source: Official Site, translated, edited)
